name: marrymap
description: MarryMap's web application and search API.

scripts.whatsapp:gateway:logs: echo 'OpenWA logs are shown in the terminal running npm run whatsapp:gateway.'
scripts.whatsapp:gateway:down: echo 'Press Ctrl+C in the terminal running npm run whatsapp:gateway to stop the local gateway.'
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@marrymap/web && npm run build --workspace=@marrymap/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@marrymap/web && npm run typecheck --workspace=@marrymap/api
